violations.text: (Meats and cheeses) was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Establishment observed vacuum packaging for meats and cheeses without RIDOH approval. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Utensils observing being stored in between the wall and prep sink. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

(Counter oven ) located in the (kitchen ) area was not in good repair. Observed door covered with cardboard and tape. PIC expecting parts to arrive by 5/10/26. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Hot water lacking at handsink in kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. FMC has expired. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2025
The chest freezer in the storage area has an accumulation of ice and food debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The cutting board to the prep unit was observed stored on the floor (leaning on a table). PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2025

Several cutting boards used as service plates are very scratched and cracked. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -ice machine -small stand mixer. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
One faucet handle was missing at the hand sink in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 04/21/2025
